questionHtml: Explain why some biologists think protecting keystone species would help preserve biological diversity in an ecosystem.
markschemeHtml:
a large effect on the ecosystem/community structure/environment«relative to abundance»
OR
influence the balance of other populations in the ecosystem
OR
other species in the habitat would also disappear
OR
many other species dependent on them for survival ✔

meta.title: Explain why some biologists think protecting keystone species would help preserve biological diversity in an ecosystem.
breadcrumbLabels: D4.2.5. Role of keystone species in the stability of ecosystems
